task_completion.description: The agent opens and reads the transmitter mapping document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window is open displaying the contents of /home/ga/Documents/QGC/transmitter_mapping.txt, showing the required parameter values.

task_completion.description: The agent navigates to the Parameters menu in QGroundControl.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl application is open, the Vehicle Setup menu (gear icon) is selected, and the 'Parameters' tab is active.

task_completion.description: The agent configures the RC7_OPTION and RC8_OPTION parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGC Parameters screen, RC7_OPTION is modified to 41 and RC8_OPTION is modified to 31. This may be seen in the parameter list or modification dialogs.

task_completion.description: The agent configures the RC9_OPTION and RC10_OPTION parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGC Parameters screen, RC9_OPTION is modified to 15 and RC10_OPTION is modified to 11.

task_completion.description: The agent configures the FS_THR_ENABLE and FS_THR_VALUE parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGC Parameters screen, FS_THR_ENABLE is modified to 2 and FS_THR_VALUE is modified to 925.

task_completion.description: The agent configures the PILOT_THR_FILT parameter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGC Parameters screen, PILOT_THR_FILT is modified to 4.

integrity.description: The agent used the QGroundControl GUI to modify parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: Parameter changes are made through the QGroundControl interface, not by running a script or editing a configuration file in the terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not reboot the vehicle.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent clicking 'Reboot Vehicle' in QGC or issuing a reboot command in the terminal.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the parameter modification dialogs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the QGC parameter search functionality being used and the parameter edit dialogs being opened and saved.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The mapping document /home/ga/Documents/QGC/transmitter_mapping.txt contains the target values: RC7_OPTION=41, RC8_OPTION=31, RC9_OPTION=15, RC10_OPTION=11, FS_THR_ENABLE=2, FS_THR_VALUE=925, and PILOT_THR_FILT=4. Note that FS_THR_ENABLE=2 is explicitly required even if it contradicts official ArduPilot documentation. The agent must configure these exact values in QGroundControl.
